title: lantana horrida var. sargentii
intro: Lantana horrida var. sargentii is a plant species known for its thorny branches and vibrant flowers, typically found in tropical and subtropical regions. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antibacterial compounds. Its health benefits are attributed to its ability to reduce fever, soothe skin irritations, and support respiratory health. In herbal preparations, Lantana horrida var. sargentii is often used in teas, infusions, and tinctures to leverage its medicinal properties and promote overall well-being.
